title: Pregnancy AI Assistant
description: Title slide introducing the cross-platform pregnancy AI assistant project.

title: One product, two platforms
description: Overview of the web and iOS apps sharing a single account.

title: What it does
description: Core features: tracking, AI assistant, and medical safety disclaimer.

title: Free to start, $19.99 to go unlimited
description: Freemium model: 5 free weekly AI questions vs. the one-time Full Pregnancy Pass.

title: Two storefronts, one pass
description: Stripe on web and RevenueCat on iOS both grant the same pass.

title: From purchase to access
description: Four-step server-side reconcile flow from iOS purchase to unlimited access.

title: Under the hood
description: Architecture: pnpm monorepo, Express backend, Clerk auth, server-side entitlements.

title: Where it stands
description: Launch status: backend live, iOS on TestFlight, App Store submission underway.
